summary: Slide-in card from the top side.

versions.changelog: Update Props API to use standard accentColor, cardBackgroundColor, and animationStiffness.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/card-from-top/src/CardFromTop.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CardFromTop` and `cardFromTopDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Customize the CardFromTop Remotion component by setting the name, title, accentColor, titleColor, cardBackgroundColor, and animationStiffness while preserving the slide-in animation from the top.
